choices.text: Elimination > Substitution > Engineering controls (physical barriers, ventilation) > Administrative (training, procedures) > PPE (last line of defense). Most effective at top. Many programs over-rely on PPE alone.

LOTO (Lockout/Tagout): isolate energy source + lock + tag with worker identifier + verify zero energy + only worker who locked can remove. Critical for electrical, mechanical work. OSHA required for energy control during maintenance.

questions.explanation: LOTO procedure required for energy control.
